mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user (tenant_id, user_id, username, password_hash, email, phone, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user SET username = #{username}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_user SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
